<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below. -->

## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (reward function, eval adapter, ...)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Code style / refactor
- [ ] Reproducibility (config, hyperparameter, seed)

## Testing
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] If touching reward functions: `pytest tests/test_rewards_*.py`
- [ ] If touching eval adapters: `pytest tests/test_eval_*.py`
- [ ] CI is green on this PR

## Affects published results?
<!-- Does this PR change any number reported in the paper or `results/training/master.csv`? -->
- [ ] No — code-only / docs-only
- [ ] Yes — describe and update `CHANGELOG.md` accordingly:

<!-- If yes, attach a brief justification: which numbers change, why, and whether the paper claim still holds. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I've added tests for the new behavior (or marked why not)
- [ ] I've updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] My commit messages explain *why*, not just *what*
